CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Continued To Jun-03-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A.'s MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Citibank, N.A.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca, Not reported. =(301/HEK)
